title: poa sudetica var. rubens
intro: Poa sudetica var. rubens, also known as red fescue, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as supporting the immune system and acting as an antiseptic. Red fescue can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal preparation methods.
